[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001100 2
1 00101101 4
2 11111001 6
3 00111001 4
4 11000110 4
5 01000100 2
6 00001100 2
7 01100000 2

23 32 11111111 a

56 65 01101100 4
67 76 11111001 6 match 2
70 07 11111101 7

13 31 11000110 4 match 4

35 53 11001110 5

61 16 01100000 2 match 7
72 27 11111001 6 match 2
